member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.FileOperationsService
member.summary: File operations for project/chat files. Refactored to avoid direct LLM calls.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.DocumentLockManager
member.summary: Thread-safe lock manager for document operations Fixes memory leak issue by implementing cleanup

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.DocumentLockManager.AcquireLockAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquire a lock for a project with timeout Automatically creates lock if it doesn't exist

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.DocumentLockManager.CleanupInactiveLocks(System.Object)
member.summary: Cleanup locks that haven't been used recently Prevents memory leak from accumulating locks

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.DocumentLockManager.RemoveLock(System.String)
member.summary: Manually remove a lock for a project (e.g., when project is deleted)

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.DocumentLockManager.LockReleaser
member.summary: Helper class to release lock when disposed

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.FilePathHelper
member.summary: Helper class for file path operations Eliminates duplicate file path manipulation code

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.FilePathHelper.GetTextFilePath(System.String)
member.summary: Get the text file path for an uploaded file Format: {filename}.{extension}.txt Example: document.pdf -> document.pdf.txt

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.FilePathHelper.GetFileExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Get file extension without the dot Returns "txt" for files without extension

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.FilePathHelper.EnsureUniqueFileName(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Ensure filename is unique in folder by appending counter Example: file.pdf -> file_1.pdf -> file_2.pdf

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.FilePathHelper.GetUploadsFolder(System.String)
member.summary: Get the uploads folder path for a project

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.FilePathHelper.GetUploadedFilesMetadataPath(System.String)
member.summary: Get the uploaded files metadata path for a project

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.FileOps.Helpers.FilePathHelper.EnsureDirectoryExists(System.String)
member.summary: Ensure directory exists, create if it doesn't
